articles.title: Ball's clutch drive saves Hornets in frantic finish
articles.original_title: Ball's clutch drive saves Hornets in frantic finish
articles.summary: LaMelo Ball hit the go‑ahead basket with 4.7 seconds left in overtime, and Miles Bridges sealed the win with a block on the final play. The Hornets eliminated the Heat in Tuesday night’s play‑in game.
key_points: Ball’s shot gave Charlotte a one‑point lead in OT.
Bridges’ buzzer‑beating block prevented Miami from scoring.
Charlotte advances, Miami’s season ends.

articles.title: Spo: Ball should've been tossed for Adebayo trip
articles.original_title: Spo: Ball should've been tossed for Adebayo trip
articles.summary: Miami’s Bam Adebayo suffered a lower‑back injury after a fall in the second quarter and did not return for the second half. The injury forced the Heat to play without their starting center for the remainder of the game.
key_points: Adebayo’s injury occurred in the second quarter.
He was ruled out for the second half.

articles.title: Blazers ride Avdija's 41 over Suns, grab 7th seed
articles.original_title: Blazers ride Avdija's 41 over Suns, grab 7th seed
articles.summary: Deni Avdija poured in 41 points as Portland erased an 11‑point fourth‑quarter deficit to beat the Phoenix Suns 114‑110. The victory secured the Trail Blazers the No. 7 seed in the Western Conference playoffs.
key_points: Avdija’s career‑high 41 points led the comeback.
Portland overcame an 11‑point fourth‑quarter hole.
Trail Blazers clinched the 7th seed in the West.

key_points: Redick emphasized the team must focus on its own preparation despite the uncertainty.
